sentences.arabic: أَخْمَدَ رِجَالُ الْإِطْفَاءِ حَرِيقًا كَبِيرًا اشْتَعَلَ فِي مَصْنَعٍ لِلْأَخْشَابِ قُرْبَ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Vatrogasci su ugasili veliki požar koji je buknuo u tvornici drveta blizu grada.
sentences.translationEn: Firefighters extinguished a large fire that broke out at a timber factory near the city.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَتْ سَيَّارَاتُ الْإِطْفَاءِ إِلَى مَكَانِ الْحَرِيقِ خِلَالَ عَشْرِ دَقَائِقَ.
sentences.translation: Vatrogasna vozila stigla su na mjesto požara za deset minuta.
sentences.translationEn: Fire engines reached the scene within ten minutes.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ تَقَعْ إِصَابَاتٌ فِي صُفُوفِ الْعُمَّالِ لِأَنَّهُمْ خَرَجُوا بِسُرْعَةٍ عِنْدَ سَمَاعِ صَفَّارَةِ الْإِنْذَارِ.
sentences.translation: Nije bilo povrijeđenih među radnicima jer su brzo izašli kada su čuli alarm.
sentences.translationEn: There were no casualties among the workers because they got out quickly when they heard the alarm.

sentences.arabic: امْتَدَّ اشْتِغَالُ النِّيرَانِ لِسَاعَتَيْنِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُسَيْطِرَ رِجَالُ الْإِطْفَاءِ عَلَيْهَا.
sentences.translation: Požar je trajao dva sata prije nego što su ga vatrogasci savladali.
sentences.translationEn: The fire burned for two hours before firefighters brought it under control.

sentences.arabic: أَكَّدَ مَسْؤُولُو الْإِطْفَاءِ أَنَّ الِالْتِزَامَ بِقَوَاعِدِ السَّلَامَةِ أَنْقَذَ أَرْوَاحَ الْعُمَّالِ.
sentences.translation: Zvaničnici vatrogasne službe potvrdili su da je poštovanje sigurnosnih pravila spasilo živote radnika.
sentences.translationEn: Fire officials confirmed that compliance with safety rules saved the workers' lives.
